data.body: MCP Registry: PUBLISHED. io.github.navapbc/rebar version 0.7.0 is live and marked isLatest:true on registry.modelcontextprotocol.io (verified via /v0/servers search). All channels now at 0.7.0: PyPI ✓, GitHub Release (Latest) ✓, Homebrew ✓, MCP Registry ✓. Smoke test ✓. The only AC not literally met is 'GitHub Release created automatically' — v0.7.0's was manual (one-off) because the auto job had a bug (fixed in change 316); the next tag release exercises the fixed auto path.
